inputMode.title: Input Mode
inputMode.description: Choose whether to provide URLs to fetch or HTML content directly

urls.title: URLs to Parse
urls.description: Click 'Add item' to add URLs one by one. Each URL will be fetched and parsed automatically.

htmlContents.title: HTML Content (Direct Input)
htmlContents.description: Directly paste HTML content here. Each item should have a name and HTML. Use this for easy input without Base64 encoding.

html.title: HTML Content
html.description: Raw HTML content (will be saved as .html file)

htmlFiles.title: HTML Files (Base64 encoded) - Advanced
htmlFiles.description: Advanced: Array of base64-encoded HTML content. Use 'htmlContents' above for easier input.

domain.title: Domain Name
domain.description: Optional domain name for organizing output (e.g., 'myblog', 'ecommerce')

iterationRounds.title: Learning Samples
iterationRounds.description: Number of HTML pages to analyze for learning extraction patterns (1-10, recommended: 3)

clusterMode.title: Auto-detect Multiple Layouts
clusterMode.description: Enable if your pages have different layouts (e.g., list pages + detail pages). The system will automatically group similar layouts.

schemaMode.title: Schema Mode
schemaMode.description: Auto: Let AI automatically discover data structure. Predefined: Use your custom schema template.

predefinedSchema.title: Custom Schema Template (JSON)
predefinedSchema.description: Only used when Schema Mode is 'Predefined'. Define the exact JSON structure you want to extract.
